message:
🐛 Strip bold-header PR templates and empty section headers (#556)

- Add extractFromBoldTemplate() for Falco/KEDA-style templates
  (**What type of PR is this?**, **What this PR does:**, etc.)
- Strip /kind, /area, /sig Prow bot commands from PR body text
- Strip "> Uncomment one" instruction lines
- Strip empty PR template headers (## Checklist, ## Further Comments,
  ## Milestone, ## Related issue, ## Proposed Changes, ## Explanation)
- Integrate bold template extraction into solution extraction flow

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
